title: PartiCull
description: Dynamic particle control for smoother gameplay: up to +30% FPS gain in heavy particle situations.
body:
# Keep your FPS high in particle chaos.

✨✨✨

The mod constantly watches your game's performance. When it detects a dip in your framerate, it intelligently removes particles to keep things smooth, then instantly brings them back when performance is stable.
 
PartiCull is a set-it-and-forget-it solution, especially in chaotic situations like rain, potion fights, or other particle-heavy scenarios. If you like to improve your experience, you can use the in-game config to set your preferred FPS target. Best of all, it's a client-side mod, which means you can use it in your single-player worlds or on any server you join, no questions asked.

 
How to open the settings:
1. Just follow this path: Esc → Mods → Select PartiCull → Config.
2. You'll see three simple options inside. 
3. Quick tip: it's best to leave the Target FPS setting alone, as it automatically syncs with your monitor.

---
